values.title: ComfortPro HVAC
values.hero_description: From emergency repairs to complete system installations, ComfortPro HVAC delivers reliable heating and cooling solutions for homes and businesses. Available 24/7 for your comfort needs.
values.cta_description: Whether it is a routine maintenance check or an emergency repair, our certified technicians are ready to help. Schedule your service today.

values.title: Air Conditioning
values.body:
Stay cool all summer with our comprehensive air conditioning services. We install, repair, and maintain all major AC brands including central air systems, ductless mini-splits, and heat pumps.

Our AC Services

  • New AC system installation
  • AC repair and diagnostics
  • Seasonal tune-ups and maintenance
  • Ductless mini-split systems
  • Indoor air quality solutions

values.title: Heating Systems
values.body:
Keep your home warm and comfortable with our expert heating services. We work with furnaces, boilers, heat pumps, and radiant heating systems to ensure reliable warmth all winter long.

Our Heating Services

  • Furnace installation and repair
  • Boiler maintenance
  • Heat pump systems
  • Radiant floor heating
  • Emergency heating repair

values.title: Preventive Maintenance
values.body:
Regular maintenance keeps your HVAC system running efficiently and extends its lifespan. Our maintenance plans include seasonal tune-ups, filter replacements, and comprehensive system inspections.

Maintenance Benefits

  • Lower energy bills
  • Fewer breakdowns
  • Extended equipment life
  • Priority service scheduling
  • Discount on repairs

values.title: Duct Cleaning & Sealing
values.body:
Improve your indoor air quality and system efficiency with professional duct cleaning and sealing services. We remove dust, allergens, and debris that accumulate in your ductwork over time.

What We Do

  • Complete duct system cleaning
  • Duct sealing and insulation
  • Air quality testing
  • Dryer vent cleaning
  • UV air purification installation

values.title: North County
values.body: ComfortPro HVAC proudly serves the North County area including Springfield, Greenville, and surrounding communities. Our local technicians provide fast response times and reliable service.

values.title: South County
values.body: Our South County team covers Lake View, Riverside, and the greater metro south region. Same-day service available for most calls.

values.title: East Metro
values.body: Covering the East Metro area from Fairview to Gresham and beyond. Our technicians know the unique HVAC needs of homes and businesses in this region.

values.title: Fast AC Repair
values.body: Our air conditioner broke down on the hottest day of the year. ComfortPro had a technician at our house within 2 hours and had it running again before dinner. Incredible service!

values.title: Excellent Furnace Installation
values.body: ComfortPro installed a new high-efficiency furnace in our home. The team was professional, clean, and explained everything thoroughly. Our energy bills have dropped significantly.

values.title: Great Maintenance Program
values.body: We have been on the annual maintenance plan for 3 years now. Our system runs like new and we have not had a single unexpected breakdown. Worth every penny.

values.title: Noticeable Air Quality Improvement
values.body: After having our ducts cleaned by ComfortPro, the difference in air quality was immediately noticeable. My allergies have improved dramatically. Highly recommend their duct cleaning service.

values.title: About ComfortPro HVAC
values.body:
ComfortPro HVAC has been providing reliable heating, ventilation, and air conditioning services since 2005. Our team of certified technicians is committed to keeping your home and business comfortable year-round.

Our Mission

To deliver exceptional HVAC services with honest pricing, quality workmanship, and outstanding customer care.

Why Choose Us

  • Certified Technicians - EPA certified and factory trained
  • 24/7 Availability - Emergency service when you need it
  • Transparent Pricing - No hidden fees or surprises
  • Quality Parts - We use only manufacturer-approved parts
